Required Technical Skills

  • Power Automate (Cloud): Advanced flow implementation, conditions, expressions, approvals, and integrations.
  • Power Automate Desktop (RPA): UI and system automation, attended and unattended execution, stability, and maintenance best practices.
  • Copilot Studio: Topic flow implementation, conversation logic, and integrations with Power Automate and Dataverse.

  • Dataverse: Table design, relationships, business rules, security roles, and solution layering.

  • Strong hands-on automation and implementation mindset.
  • Ability to independently develop and maintain medium-complexity automation solutions.
  • Attention to reliability, error handling, and long-term maintainability of automation flows.
  • Ability to work with technical specifications, functional inputs, and defined solution designs.

  • Experience with Power Pages.
  • Exposure to Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, or APIs.
  • Experience integrating automation solutions with Microsoft Teams.

Experience & Education

  • 2–4 years of hands-on experience delivering Power Platform solutions.
  • Proven production experience with Power Automate Desktop (RPA).
  • Experience implementing at least one Copilot Studio solution.
  • Microsoft certifications are a plus (PL-200, PL-500, Copilot Studio credentials).

The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable AEM solutions within an AEM as a Cloud Service (AEMaaCS) environment. The role requires hands-on experience with AEM Sites, Assets, Content Fragments, Experience Fragments, and integration with enterprise applications and third-party systems.

Key Responsibilities

AEM Development

  • Design, develop, and customize AEM components, templates, dialogs, and workflows.
  • Build reusable, scalable, and maintainable solutions following AEM best practices.
  • Develop and manage solutions using AEM Sites, Assets, Content Fragments, and Experience Fragments.
  • Configure and optimize Dispatcher caching and content delivery mechanisms.
  • Ensure platform scalability, performance optimization, and adherence to security standards.
  • Participate in content migration, deployment, and cloud-based implementation activities.

Backend Development

  • Develop backend services and business logic using Java/J2EE technologies.
  • Build and maintain Apache Sling Models, OSGi services, Servlets, and RESTful APIs.
  • Implement integrations with third-party applications, including CRM systems, marketing platforms, and external APIs.
  • Develop custom workflows, schedulers, event handlers, and business process automation within AEM.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve backend performance and integration issues.

Frontend Development

  • Develop responsive and user-friendly web interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+).
  • Create AEM front-end components using HTL (Sightly).
  • Work with modern JavaScript frameworks such as React or Angular.
  • Integrate frontend applications with AEM backend services using Client Libraries and SPA Editor frameworks.
  • Ensure cross-browser compatibility, responsive design, accessibility compliance, and optimal user experience.

Collaboration & Best Practices

  • Collaborate closely with architects, designers, business stakeholders, and cross-functional development teams.
  • Participate in code reviews and enforce development standards and best practices.
  • Support CI/CD implementation and deployment processes within cloud environments.
  • Stay updated with the latest Adobe Experience Manager and Adobe Experience Cloud technologies.

Preferred Skills

Technical Skills - Strong experience with Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) 6.x and AEM as a Cloud Service (AEMaaCS). - Proficiency in Java/J2EE development. - Hands-on experience with Apache Sling, Sling Models, OSGi Framework, Servlets, and REST APIs. - Strong knowledge of AEM Sites, Assets, Content Fragments, Experience Fragments, and Dispatcher. - Expertise in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), and HTL (Sightly). - Experience with React.js or Angular frameworks. - Familiarity with Git, Maven, Jenkins, and CI/CD pipelines. - Knowledge of cloud-native development and deployment practices.

Preferred Skills - Experience with Adobe Experience Cloud products and integrations. - Understanding of GraphQL APIs in AEM. - Knowledge of Adobe Target, Adobe Analytics, or Adobe Campaign integrations. - Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments.

Educational Qualification

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.

Preferred Candidate Profile

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Passion for delivering scalable, high-quality digital experience solutions.
summary: Senior AEM Full Stack Developer required for cloud-based solutions, focusing on frontend/backend development with AEM, Java, and React/Angular.
